audioTest.title: Audio Test
audioTest.idleDesc: Record {{duration}}s speaking normally to evaluate your setup quality
audioTest.recordingDesc: Speak as if recording normally. Avoid long pauses.
audioTest.analyzingDesc: Calculating quality metrics. This may take up to 30s.
audioTest.testFailed: Audio test had issues. Check the guidelines below.

snr.label: Background Noise (SNR)
snr.guidance: Your environment is too noisy. Try recording in a quieter place, close windows/doors and turn off fans or air conditioning.

rms.label: Volume Level (RMS)
rms.guidanceLow: Your microphone volume is too low. Speak closer to the microphone or increase the gain in system settings.
rms.guidanceHigh: The volume is too high and may cause distortion. Move slightly away from the microphone or reduce the gain.

srmr.label: Reverberation (SRMR)
srmr.guidance: There is too much reverberation (echo) in your environment. Try recording in a smaller space or with sound-absorbing materials (curtains, carpet).

wvmos.label: Voice Quality (WVMOS)
wvmos.guidance: Overall voice quality is below expectations. Check if the microphone is working properly and if there are no interferences.

utmos.label: Speech Naturalness (UTMOS)
utmos.guidance: Speech naturalness is compromised. Try speaking in a more natural and consistent tone.

sigmos_ovrl.label: Signal Quality (SigMOS)
sigmos_ovrl.guidance: Overall signal quality is low. Check microphone connections and try a different device.

sigmos_disc.label: Distortion (SigMOS)
sigmos_disc.guidance: There is distortion in the audio. Reduce the input volume or move away from the microphone.

sigmos_reverb.label: Reverb (SigMOS)
sigmos_reverb.guidance: Excessive reverberation detected. Use a more acoustically treated environment.

vqscore.label: Voice Quality Score
vqscore.guidance: Voice quality score is low. Improve the environment and check equipment.

mic_sr.label: Microphone Bandwidth
mic_sr.guidance: Your microphone has limited bandwidth. Use a better quality microphone if possible (USB headset or condenser).

rnnoise.label: RNNoise
rnnoise.active: Background noise suppression via neural network

koala.label: Koala
koala.active: Advanced noise suppression via Picovoice Koala (post-processing)

noiseGate.label: Noise Gate
noiseGate.active: Silences non-speech segments to reduce residual noise

environment.title: Recording Environment
environment.text: Record in a quiet place with minimal background noise. Avoid fans, TV, music, traffic or other people talking. A closed room is recommended.

audioQuality.title: Audio Quality
audioQuality.text: Use a good quality microphone or headset. Both speakers must be clearly audible. Keep a consistent distance from the microphone and avoid touching or moving the device.

twoParticipants.title: Two Participants
twoParticipants.text: The conversation must include two different speakers. Each person should speak naturally and take turns. Avoid interrupting or talking at the same time.

naturalConversation.title: Natural Conversation
naturalConversation.text: Speak naturally and clearly, like in a normal conversation. Avoid sounding robotic or overly scripted. The dialogue should sound realistic.

followTopic.title: Follow the Topic
followTopic.text: If a topic or prompt is provided, keep the conversation relevant. Both should actively participate.

speechPace.title: Speech Pace
speechPace.text: Speak at a moderate and clear pace. Don't speak too fast or too slow and pronounce words clearly.

noPersonalData.title: No Personal Data
noPersonalData.text: Do not mention real full names, addresses, phone numbers, documents or any sensitive personal information.

continuousRecording.title: Continuous Recording
continuousRecording.text: The conversation should be recorded continuously without cuts or edits, unless specifically instructed.

recordingDuration.title: Recording Duration
recordingDuration.text: Duration may vary: 10, 15, 20, 25 or 30 minutes, depending on task instructions.

consistency.title: Consistency
consistency.text: Maintain the same environment, microphone distance and voice clarity throughout the entire conversation.
